title: oenothera muricata subsp. ammophila
intro: Oenothera muricata subsp. ammophila, also known as Beach Evening Primrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the family Onagraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of phenolic compounds and essential oils. The health benefits of Beach Evening Primrose include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various health conditions. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its effectiveness and safety for human consumption have not been extensively scientifically studied.
